accepted_candidates.label: Creator Idea Sprint Loop
accepted_candidates.description: A rapid loop for turning creator signals into fresh post, clip, or product concepts before momentum fades.
accepted_candidates.specialization_surface: running the repeated creator idea sprint loop workflow inside the creator growth systems wedge
